title: gbrain #693: doctor --json should suppress implicit progress
summary: For gbrain issue 693 / PR 824, plain gbrain doctor json must keep machine readable mode quiet on stderr; only explicit progress json doctor json should emit structured JSONL progress. The fix centralizes doctor progress
body:
For gbrain issue #693 / PR #824, plain gbrain doctor --json must keep machine-readable mode quiet on stderr; only explicit --progress-json doctor --json should emit structured JSONL progress. The fix centralizes doctor progress option resolution in doctorProgressOptions(jsonOutput), returning quiet for jsonOutput without progressJson or quiet already set, otherwise deferring to cliOptsToProgressOptions.
Evidence: Issue https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/issues/693 and PR https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/pull/824. Added unit regression in test/doctor.test.ts. Tests passed: bun test test/doctor.test.ts, 23 pass 0 fail; bun test test/e2e/doctor-progress.test.ts skipped locally because no DB configured; bun run typecheck and git diff --check passed.
Verified by: test/doctor.test.ts, e2e skip check, bun run typecheck, git diff --check
